Rippr uses the following third-party projects in its Windows release package.

yt-dlp
https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp
License: Unlicense (the upstream LICENSE file is included when the installer
can download it).

FFmpeg / FFprobe
https://ffmpeg.org/
The Windows build is downloaded from https://www.gyan.dev/ffmpeg/builds/.
Keep the COPYING, LICENSE, and README files from that archive with the
published package and follow the build's stated GPL/LGPL terms.

The Rippr installer downloads these dependencies over HTTPS at install time so
the release does not ship stale media-site support or codec binaries.
